title: Sable Touys
description: A collection of creative utilities for working with Sable's sub-levels
body:
Sable Touys is a creative mode utility mod for working with sub-levels from [Sable](https://modrinth.com/mod/sable). It contains a handful of simple to use items, most of which are essentially command shortcuts. ## Clone Gun Allows for copying / pasting sub-levels. ## Bubble Blower An easy way to create sub-levels by selecting two points in the world. ## Camera Saves the positions of all selected sub-levels into a photo. The photo can be used to restore their positions later. ## Crowbar A simple item with extra pushing strength. They can be stacked on each other to combine their strengths. ## ...And more! I didn't feel like recording more gifs but there are more items
They all have descriptions in game ## ⚠️ Issue regarding the Clone Gun Arbitrarily storing sub-levels isn't currently supported in Sable, so the implementation of this idea is a little unstable. - Block entities might not copy over well, it varies - Normal entities are not copied at all - Contraptions from Create do not work
